result:
## 方法說明

ccodegraph 的 `expands` 邊未收錄 `EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL`(這類物件式/宏呼叫在此圖是已知盲點,見 skill 說明的「Object-like macro usage … not (fully) modelled」),SQL 查詢回傳 0 筆。因此改用 `grep -rn "EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL(" kernel/sched/*.c`(僅限 `kernel/sched/` 這一層 `.c` 檔,不含子目錄如 `kernel/sched/*.h`)作為主要來源,並用兩種獨立方式互相核對總數:
- `grep -rn ... | wc -l` → **53**
- `grep -rEn "\bEXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL\("` 加詞邊界避免誤配其他前綴的宏 → **53**（一致)

## 完整清單(依檔案、行號排序,53 筆)

**kernel/sched/clock.c**(5)
- `sched_clock` — clock.c:67
- `local_clock` — clock.c:319
- `sched_clock_cpu` — clock.c:410
- `sched_clock_idle_sleep_event` — clock.c:453
- `sched_clock_idle_wakeup_event` — clock.c:472

**kernel/sched/core.c**(18)
- `migrate_disable` — core.c:2425
- `migrate_enable` — core.c:2460
- `set_cpus_allowed_ptr` — core.c:3222
- `kick_process` — core.c:3527
- `preempt_notifier_inc` — core.c:4897
- `preempt_notifier_dec` — core.c:4903
- `preempt_notifier_register` — core.c:4916
- `preempt_notifier_unregister` — core.c:4928
- `preempt_schedule_notrace` — core.c:6964
- `sched_setattr_nocheck` — core.c:7896
- `sched_set_fifo` — core.c:7940
- `sched_set_fifo_low` — core.c:7950
- `sched_set_normal` — core.c:7960
- `preempt_model_##mode`(⚠️宏樣板,見下方說明)— core.c:8875
- `yield_to` — core.c:8988
- `sched_show_task` — core.c:9185
- `__cant_sleep` — core.c:10218
- `__cant_migrate` — core.c:10250

**kernel/sched/cpufreq.c**(2)
- `cpufreq_add_update_util_hook` — cpufreq.c:42
- `cpufreq_remove_update_util_hook` — cpufreq.c:58

**kernel/sched/cputime.c**(6)
- `task_cputime_adjusted` — cputime.c:468(#ifdef 分支之一)
- `task_cputime_adjusted` — cputime.c:640(另一 #ifdef 分支的同名函式,非重複行)
- `vtime_guest_enter` — cputime.c:764
- `vtime_guest_exit` — cputime.c:776
- `kcpustat_field` — cputime.c:1012
- `kcpustat_cpu_fetch` — cputime.c:1100

**kernel/sched/fair.c**(1)
- `sched_smt_present` — fair.c:7033

**kernel/sched/idle.c**(1)
- `play_idle_precise` — idle.c:372

**kernel/sched/isolation.c**(6)
- `housekeeping_overridden` — isolation.c:24
- `housekeeping_enabled` — isolation.c:37
- `housekeeping_any_cpu` — isolation.c:54
- `housekeeping_cpumask` — isolation.c:63
- `housekeeping_affine` — isolation.c:71
- `housekeeping_test_cpu` — isolation.c:80

**kernel/sched/psi.c**(2)
- `psi_memstall_enter` — psi.c:1067
- `psi_memstall_leave` — psi.c:1097

**kernel/sched/topology.c**(2)
- `sched_numa_find_nth_cpu` — topology.c:2145
- `sched_numa_hop_mask` — topology.c:2177

**kernel/sched/wait_bit.c**(3)
- `out_of_line_wait_on_bit_timeout` — wait_bit.c:79
- `bit_wait_timeout` — wait_bit.c:229
- `bit_wait_io_timeout` — wait_bit.c:243

**kernel/sched/wait.c**(7)
- `add_wait_queue_priority` — wait.c:48
- `__wake_up_locked` — wait.c:176
- `__wake_up_locked_key` — wait.c:182
- `__wake_up_locked_key_bookmark` — wait.c:189
- `__wake_up_sync_key` — wait.c:215
- `__wake_up_locked_sync_key` — wait.c:238
- `__wake_up_sync` — wait.c:247

## ⚠️ 需特別留意的一筆:core.c:8875

該行不是直接的 `EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL(具體符號)`,而是巨集 `PREEMPT_MODEL_ACCESSOR(mode)`(定義於 core.c:8869-8875)內部的樣板:`EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL(preempt_model_##mode)`。此巨集在 core.c:8877-8879 被展開呼叫 3 次:
- `PREEMPT_MODEL_ACCESSOR(none)` → 實際匯出 `preempt_model_none`
- `PREEMPT_MODEL_ACCESSOR(voluntary)` → 實際匯出 `preempt_model_voluntary`
- `PREEMPT_MODEL_ACCESSOR(full)` → 實際匯出 `preempt_model_full`

這是文字引擎的已知盲點(宏生成定義,`##` token-pasting 不會被文字比對展開),grep 只能看到宏定義本體 1 行,但實際執行期會多產生 3 個匯出符號。

## 總數

- **文字/原始碼中 `EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL(...)` 出現次數:53 筆**(兩種獨立 grep 方式核對一致:純字串計數與詞邊界正則計數皆為 53)
- 其中 52 筆為直接具名符號匯出,1 筆(core.c:8875)為宏樣板,實際巨集展開後再多匯出 3 個符號(`preempt_model_none/voluntary/full`)
- 若以「實際被匯出的相異符號」計算(把巨集展開算進去、扣掉樣板本身這 1 行、加回 3 個展開結果):**55 個符號匯出**

如果你要的是「原始碼中出現 `EXPORT_SYMBOL_GPL(` 的行數」,答案是 **53**;如果要的是「實際匯出的符號總數(含巨集展開)」,答案是 **55**。
